data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: User interactions are simplified to reduce decision time.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined menus and action buttons maintain user engagement.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interfaces are designed to minimize the time to interact with key elements.
data.technical_spec: Larger, easily clickable buttons to enhance accessibility.

data.title: Consistency Principle
data.description: Maintains uniformity in design and interaction patterns across the platform.
data.technical_spec: Consistent design language and interaction cues.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: A visually appealing interface to enhance perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: High-quality visuals and intuitive layout for a pleasing user experience.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Designs align with user expectations formed by experiences on other platforms.
data.technical_spec: Common UI patterns borrowed from similar applications.
